meta.title: PlexMuxy · Mux workspace
meta.description: Plan, review, and run Plex-ready media mux jobs from a focused desktop workspace.
sidebar.label: Mux workflow navigation
sidebar.source.title: Source
sidebar.source.subtitle: Choose media
sidebar.options.title: Options
sidebar.options.subtitle: Shape the output
sidebar.plan.title: Plan
sidebar.plan.subtitle: Review tracks
sidebar.run.title: Run
sidebar.run.subtitle: Monitor results
sidebar.environment.title: Environment configuration
sidebar.environment.subtitle: Persistent system setup
appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.fixed: {theme} theme is fixed on this device
language.title: Language
language.fixed: This language is fixed for PlexMuxy
page.title: Prepare a mux job
page.description: Choose a media folder, tune this session, then inspect the exact track plan before any files change.
activity.title: Working on your request
alert.title: Action needed
source.title: Select the media directory
source.description: PlexMuxy scans this folder for video, audio, subtitle, and font candidates.
source.help: You can also paste an absolute path. Changing the source clears the current plan.
environment.pageDescription: These settings persist across mux jobs and are used whenever automatic dependency detection cannot find a tool.
environment.title: Dependency paths
environment.description: Automatic detection remains the default. Choose an executable only when a dependency is not discoverable through system environment variables or PATH.
environment.mkvmerge.help: Required mux engine. PlexMuxy cannot run a mux job without it.
environment.ffmpeg.help: Optional verification and media testing tool; not required for normal mux output.
environment.unrar.help: Optional extractor used only when font archives require the RAR format.
environment.requiredMissing: Required dependency is missing or invalid.
environment.notifications.title: Native job notifications
environment.notifications.description: When enabled, Windows receives a native notification after a mux job completes, fails, or is cancelled.
environment.notifications.available: Native Windows notifications are available on this device.
environment.notifications.unavailable: Native notifications are unavailable on this platform or runtime.
environment.tools.title: Configuration and diagnostics
environment.tools.description: Review the active configuration or export a diagnostic archive for troubleshooting.
environment.footer: Environment changes are validated before they are saved.
options.title: Shape the output
options.description: These values apply to the next plan and can be saved as your local defaults.
options.cleanup.label: Cleanup policy
options.cleanup.help: Keep sources, move them after success, or delete confirmed inputs.
options.extraDir.label: Extra media directory
options.extraDir.help: Search a second folder for companion tracks and attachments.
options.outputDir.label: Output directory
options.outputDir.help: Leave empty to write the muxed file beside its source video.
options.outputSuffix.label: Output suffix
options.outputSuffix.help: Added before the file extension when the suffix strategy is active.
options.nameStrategy.label: Naming strategy
options.nameStrategy.help: Choose how PlexMuxy derives the final file name.
options.nameTemplate.label: Name template
options.nameTemplate.help: Available when the template strategy is selected.
options.fontSubset.label: Subset fonts for this workflow
options.fontSubset.help: Attach only glyphs referenced by matched ASS/SSA subtitles. Turning this off restores your previous font mode.
options.overwrite.label: Overwrite existing outputs
options.overwrite.help: Requires confirmation before the job starts and can replace existing files.
plan.title: Inspect the mux plan
plan.description: Nothing is written until you review the matched tracks and start the job.
plan.empty.title: No plan yet
plan.empty.detail: Choose a source directory and generate a plan to review matched tracks.
plan.empty.noPlansDetail: Check the source folder and current matching configuration, then try again.
run.title: Run and verify
run.description: Monitor progress, verification, warnings, and cleanup results in one place.
run.empty.title: No run yet
run.empty.detail: Generate and review a plan before starting the mux job.
run.empty.noResultsDetail: The job finished without a result payload. Export diagnostics before trying again.
footer.local: PlexMuxy processes media on this device.
footer.review: Review destructive options before every run.
confirm.title: Start this mux job?
confirm.review: Review the plan and continue only if these changes are expected.
close.title: Close this window?
close.description: Your saved environment configuration will remain after the window closes.
close.descriptionRunning: A mux job is still active. Closing PlexMuxy will stop the running job.
close.descriptionUnsaved: This window contains unsaved settings. Close it and discard those edits?
error.chooseInput: Choose or enter an input directory first.
error.generatePlanFirst: Generate a plan before running mux.
error.deleteWarning: Source cleanup can permanently delete files after a successful mux.
error.overwriteWarning: Existing output files may be replaced.
error.notificationFailed: Windows did not accept the test notification.
toast.settingsSaved.title: Settings saved
toast.settingsSaved.body: Workflow defaults were validated and saved.
toast.environmentSaved.title: Environment saved
toast.environmentSaved.body: Dependency paths and notification preferences are now persistent.
toast.environmentError.title: Environment update failed
toast.diagnostics.title: Diagnostics exported
toast.diagnostics.body:
The diagnostic archive was saved to:
{path}
toast.cancelRequested.title: Cancellation requested
toast.cancelRequested.body: PlexMuxy will stop after the current safe checkpoint.
toast.notificationUnavailable.title: Notifications unavailable
toast.notificationUnavailable.body: Native notifications require the Windows desktop runtime.
toast.notificationSent.title: Test notification sent
toast.notificationSent.body: Windows accepted the native PlexMuxy notification.
toast.job.completed.title: Mux job completed
toast.job.failed.title: Mux job failed
toast.job.failed.body: The mux job did not complete.
toast.job.cancelled.title: Mux job cancelled
notification.test.title: PlexMuxy notifications are ready
notification.test.message: Native Windows notifications are configured correctly.
sidebar.jobs.title: Jobs
sidebar.jobs.subtitle: Queue and history
options.audioFilter.label: Filter source audio tracks
options.audioFilter.help: Opt in to conservative source-audio rules. Unknown language remains preserved.
options.audioPatterns.label: Excluded title patterns
options.audioPatterns.help: Comma-separated case-insensitive text or glob patterns.
options.audioLanguages.label: Kept languages
options.audioLanguages.help: Comma-separated MKV or IETF language codes. Leave empty to avoid language filtering.
options.keepDefaultAudio.label: Always keep default audio
options.keepDefaultAudio.help: Default source tracks take precedence over exclusion rules.
options.keepUnknownAudio.label: Keep unknown language
options.keepUnknownAudio.help: Prevents missing or unknown language metadata from causing deletion.
plan.noAssignments: No additional scanned tracks are available.
track.reason.preserve_default_audio: Preserved because this is the default track
track.reason.exclude_language_not_allowe: Excluded because language is not allowed
track.reason.preserve_no_rule_matched: Preserved because no exclusion rule matched
jobs.title: Queue and history
jobs.description: Directory tasks run one at a time and remain visible after restart.
jobs.listDescription: Review status and retry interrupted work.
jobs.empty.title: No task history
jobs.empty.detail: Generate a plan to create the first persistent task.
environment.cache.title: Persistent font subset cache
environment.cache.description: Validated subsets can be reused across tasks and are isolated by tool and schema versions.
environment.cache.cleared: The persistent font cache was cleared.
toast.job.interrupted.title: Mux job interrupted
toast.job.interrupted.body: The application exited before the job completed.
options.allowNoAudio.label: Allow output with no audio
options.allowNoAudio.help: Dangerous: permits manual rules to remove every source audio track.
environment.cache.enableHelp: Disable to generate subsets only in the active task workspace.
environment.integrations.title: Updates and Plex
environment.integrations.description: Both features are opt-in. Plex tokens are read from an environment variable and never saved here.
environment.updates.title: Update check
environment.updates.enabled: Enabled with a short timeout and cached result.
environment.plex.mappingsHelp: One per line: local absolute path = server-visible path
